name: grotto-skills
description: Public Grotto developer skills for HTML5/WebGL game creators.

skills.name: grotto-game-runtime-developer-sdk
skills.summary: Core Grotto Runtime SDK guide for trusted identity, cloud saves, autosave, events, presence, and runtime troubleshooting. Links to specialist token-gating and hosted-client workflow skills.

skills.name: grotto-game-token-gated-inventory
skills.summary: Token-gate Grotto game skins, items, levels, and rewards using Runtime SDK identity, associated wallets, and indexer-backed inventory APIs.
skills.inject: Token-gated content — gate skins, levels, items or rewards on NFT / ERC-1155 / ERC-721 ownership. Derive identity from the runtime session (never trust the client), resolve the player's associated wallets, and treat entitlements as server-authoritative; the client only reflects the result. Degrade to ungated defaults when the check is unavailable.

skills.name: grotto-hosted-game-github-workflow
skills.summary: Maintain Grotto games with GitHub PRs, CI tests, Railway/Vercel hosted clients, and a small Grotto iframe wrapper for fast updates and rollback.
skills.inject: Hosted-game workflow — for games maintained in GitHub: deploy the real client to Railway/Vercel and upload only a tiny root `index.html` wrapper that iframes the hosted URL and forwards `grotto:runtime` postMessages. Enables PR review, CI gates and rollback. Use only when a durable hosted domain exists.

skills.name: grotto-studio-game-updates
skills.summary: How a creator updates a game in Grotto Studio so the new version reaches players instantly — iterating with B.O.B., keeping cloud saves intact, and rolling back.
skills.inject: Updating a live game — in Grotto Studio every change is a new build that becomes the version players load on their next session: no re-upload, no redeploy, instant for the creator. Keep the root `index.html` entry stable, prefer small targeted edits (so updates are fast and rollback-able), and never break a working save format without migrating it.
